bead.title: Documentation pass: PRD, CONTRACT-003 cross-ref, AGENTS.md, package-doc/method mirror verification
bead.description:
Source manifest: .ddx/beads-harness-interface-refactor.yaml
Source bead ID: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-12
Governing plan: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md

See the manifest and the plan for full context, touch-point inventory, and sub-sequence ordering.
bead.acceptance:
1. PRD line 204 cites CONTRACT-004 instead of CONTRACT-003 for the harness interface
2. CONTRACT-003 cross-references CONTRACT-004 as the source for HarnessInfo.Quota and HarnessInfo.Account population
3. primary-harness-capability-baseline.md references resolve (no deleted symbols cited)
4. AGENTS.md (or equivalent) describes the harness implementation pattern: implement Harness plus optional sub-interfaces, snapshot types package-private, no cross-harness imports, SupportedAliases/SupportedLimitIDs as the stable contract surface
5. A Go test using go/doc parses each internal/harnesses/<name>/ package comment and asserts the documented Supported* sets equal the method return values on a default Runner{} instance; drift fails CI
